title: POST-H-018-C — Replay fixtures y redacción
commands: python -m devpilot_core connector sandbox run --mode replay --json --write-report

python -m pytest -p no:ddtrace tests/test_post_h_018_connector_replay.py tests/test_post_h_018_connector_sandbox_runner.py tests/test_post_h_018_connector_sandbox_policy.py tests/test_schema_registry.py tests/test_project_global_state.py -q
pass_criteria: Replay uses deterministic local fixtures from evals/fixtures/connector_replay_cases.json.
All replay fixtures pass redaction checks.
No fixture contains secrets, tokens, URLs, private keys or .env references.
ConnectorSandboxReport includes fixtures_total, fixtures_passed, redaction_passed and deterministic_replay.
network_used, external_api_used, mutations_performed and connector_write_used remain false.
block_criteria: Replay fixture contains secret-like key/value, URL, bearer value, private key or .env reference.
Replay mode has no fixture for selected connector/operation.
Replay attempts network, external API, mutation, connector write, remote execution or plugin execution.
risks: Replay is fixture-backed and does not prove production connector integration readiness.
Policy/Approval/RBAC binding remains incomplete until POST-H-018-D.
Final connector-sandbox quality gate remains POST-H-018-E scope.
